# Curated base-coverage test set for the transformers uplift pipeline.
#
# This is the test list the orchestrator (workflow-transformers-uplift.yml)
# copies into .pytest_tests_to_run on iteration 1 of every uplift run.
# It defines what "base-coverage" means for hardware testing during an
# uplift — kept small on purpose so the test+fix loop converges fast.
#
# Selection criteria (in priority order):
#   1. Architectural diversity within each category — pick models that
#      exercise different transformers code paths (encoder-decoder vs
#      decoder-only, contrastive vs early-fusion multimodal, anchor-based
#      vs anchor-free detection, etc.). Maximizes coverage per test slot.
#   2. Popularity / blast radius — favor families that downstream users
#      hit first (llama, bert, clip, t5...). When these break, real users
#      notice immediately.
#   3. Recently churning families in transformers releases — higher risk
#      of future breakage, so cheap to keep them in the canary set.
#   4. single_device + inference variants only — keeps the hardware
#      matrix simple. Multi-chip / training coverage is out of scope for
#      the uplift loop.
#   5. EXPECTED_PASSING status in tests/runner/test_config — skipped or
#      xfail'd tests would produce no signal.
#   * Speed is a tiebreaker, never a primary criterion. A fast test is
#     often a fast SKIP, which catches nothing.
#
# Breakdown (41 tests total):
#   LLM                  10  decoder-only LLMs + encoder-decoder (t5) +
#                            state-space (mamba) + multi-query attn (falcon)
#                            + small-expert (phi4) + code-specialized (deepseek)
#   Encoder               5  bert, albert, roberta, distilbert, xlm_roberta
#   Vision-CNN            5  resnet, vgg, efficientnet, vit, swin
#   Vision-Detection      5  detr (transformer), yolov3/yolos/yolox (yolo
#                            family + anchor-free variant), retinanet (FPN)
#   Vision-Segmentation   4  segformer, sam, monodepth2, glpn_kitti
#   Multimodal            5  clip + siglip (contrastive), vit (vision-only),
#                            perceiverio (Perceiver IO), vilt (early fusion)
#   Audio                 3  whisper, wav2vec2, musicgen_small
#   Embedding             2  sentencizer, bge_1_5
#   Diffusion             2  stable_diffusion_unet (classic SD), flux (DiT)
#
# When updating this file: also update the breakdown counts above, and
# re-verify the new entry's status in tests/runner/test_config/*.yaml.

# --- LLM ---
tests/runner/test_models.py::test_all_models_torch[llama/sequence_classification/pytorch-3.2_1B-single_device-inference]
tests/runner/test_models.py::test_all_models_jax[qwen_2_5/causal_lm/jax-1.5B-single_device-inference]
tests/runner/test_models.py::test_all_models_torch[gpt2/pytorch-Sequence_Classification-single_device-inference]
tests/runner/test_models.py::test_all_models_jax[mistral/causal_lm/jax-v0_3_Instruct-single_device-inference]
tests/runner/test_models.py::test_all_models_torch[gemma/pytorch-1.1_2B_IT-single_device-inference]
tests/runner/test_models.py::test_all_models_torch[t5/pytorch-Flan_T5_Small-single_device-inference]
tests/runner/test_models.py::test_all_models_torch[mamba/pytorch-790M_HF-single_device-inference]
tests/runner/test_models.py::test_all_models_torch[falcon/pytorch-3_1B_Base-single_device-inference]
tests/runner/test_models.py::test_all_models_torch[phi4/causal_lm/pytorch-Phi_4-single_device-inference]
tests/runner/test_models.py::test_all_models_torch[deepseek/deepseek_coder/pytorch-1_3B_Instruct-single_device-inference]

# --- Encoder ---
tests/runner/test_models.py::test_all_models_torch[bert/sentence_embedding_generation/pytorch-emrecan/bert-base-turkish-cased-mean-nli-stsb-tr-single_device-inference]
tests/runner/test_models.py::test_all_models_jax[albert/masked_lm/jax-Base_v2-single_device-inference]
tests/runner/test_models.py::test_all_models_jax[roberta/masked_lm/jax-Base-single_device-inference]
tests/runner/test_models.py::test_all_models_jax[distilbert/masked_lm/jax-Base_Uncased-single_device-inference]
tests/runner/test_models.py::test_all_models_jax[xlm_roberta/causal_lm/jax-Base-single_device-inference]

# --- Vision-CNN ---
tests/runner/test_models.py::test_all_models_torch[resnet/pytorch-ResNet18-single_device-inference]
tests/runner/test_models.py::test_all_models_torch[vgg/pytorch-Torchvision_Vgg19-single_device-inference]
tests/runner/test_models.py::test_all_models_torch[efficientnet/pytorch-Timm_B0-single_device-inference]
tests/runner/test_models.py::test_all_models_jax[vit/image_classification/jax-Base_Patch32_384-single_device-inference]
tests/runner/test_models.py::test_all_models_torch[swin/image_classification/pytorch-v2_Tiny_Patch4_Window8_256-single_device-inference]

# --- Vision-Detection ---
tests/runner/test_models.py::test_all_models_torch[detr/object_detection/pytorch-ResNet50_Backbone-single_device-inference]
tests/runner/test_models.py::test_all_models_torch[yolov3/pytorch-Base-single_device-inference]
tests/runner/test_models.py::test_all_models_torch[yolos/pytorch-single_device-inference]
tests/runner/test_models.py::test_all_models_torch[retinanet/pytorch-ResNet18_Backbone_with_FPN-single_device-inference]
tests/runner/test_models.py::test_all_models_torch[yolox/pytorch-Nano-single_device-inference]

# --- Vision-Segmentation ---

tests/runner/test_models.py::test_all_models_torch[monodepth2/pytorch-Mono+stereo_1024x320-single_device-inference]
tests/runner/test_models.py::test_all_models_torch[glpn_kitti/pytorch-single_device-inference]

# --- Multimodal ---
tests/runner/test_models.py::test_all_models_jax[clip/image_classification/jax-Base_Patch16-single_device-inference]
tests/runner/test_models.py::test_all_models_torch[siglip/image_text_similarity/pytorch-Base_Patch16_256_Multilingual-single_device-inference]
tests/runner/test_models.py::test_all_models_jax[vit/image_classification/jax-Base_Patch32_384-single_device-inference]
tests/runner/test_models.py::test_all_models_torch[perceiverio_vision/pytorch-Vision_Perceiver_Conv-single_device-inference]
tests/runner/test_models.py::test_all_models_torch[vilt/question_answering/pytorch-Vqa-single_device-inference]

# --- Audio ---
tests/runner/test_models.py::test_all_models_jax[whisper/audio_classification/jax-Large_v3-single_device-inference]
tests/runner/test_models.py::test_all_models_jax[wav2vec2/audio_classification/jax-Large_Lv_60-single_device-inference]
tests/runner/test_models.py::test_all_models_torch[musicgen_small/pytorch-single_device-inference]

# --- Embedding ---
tests/runner/test_models.py::test_all_models_torch[sentencizer/pytorch-Xlm_Roberta_Base-single_device-inference]

# --- Diffusion ---
tests/runner/test_models.py::test_all_models_torch[stable_diffusion_unet/pytorch-Base-single_device-inference]
